CustomField.formula:
IF(OR(CONTAINS( Id_Obtentor__c , "03"),CONTAINS( Id_Obtentor__c , "14"), CONTAINS( Id_Obtentor__c , "85") ), IMAGE("/resource/MarcasSE/GDM.png","GDM",65,100), IF(CONTAINS( Id_Obtentor__c , "13"), IMAGE("/resource/MarcasSE/Pioneer.jpg","Pioneer",20,100), IF(CONTAINS( Id_Obtentor__c , "87"), IMAGE("/resource/MarcasSE/Brevant.jpg","Brevant",20,100), IF(OR(CONTAINS( Id_Obtentor__c , "04"),CONTAINS( Id_Obtentor__c , "23") ), IMAGE("/resource/MarcasSE/Syngenta.jpg","Syngenta",61,100), IF(CONTAINS( Id_Obtentor__c , "24"), IMAGE("/resource/MarcasSE/Stine.jpg","Stine",28,100), IF(CONTAINS( Id_Obtentor__c , "26"), IMAGE("/resource/MarcasSE/ACA.jpg","ACA",36,100), IF(CONTAINS( Id_Obtentor__c , "16"), IMAGE("/resource/MarcasSE/MacroSeed.jpg","MacroSeed",36,100), IF(CONTAINS( Id_Obtentor__c , "90"), IMAGE("/resource/Nord","Nord",36,100), IF(CONTAINS( Id_Obtentor__c , "06"), IMAGE("/resource/Klein","Klein",36,100), IF(CONTAINS( Id_Obtentor__c , "12"), IMAGE("/resource/LG","LG",36,100), IF(CONTAINS( Id_Obtentor__c , "51"), IMAGE("/resource/Quilmes","Quilmes",36,100),
IF(CONTAINS( Id_Obtentor__c , "77"), IMAGE("/resource/MarcasSE/BASF_Credenz.jpg","Credenz",46,193), IF(CONTAINS( Id_Obtentor__c , "17"), IMAGE("/resource/MarcasSE/BASF_Credenz.jpg","Credenz",46,193),
IF(CONTAINS( Id_Obtentor__c , "19"), IMAGE("/resource/MarcasSE/Bioceres.jpg","Bioceres",80,80), IF(CONTAINS( Id_Obtentor__c , "05"), IMAGE("/resource/Buck","Buck",65,100), IF(CONTAINS( Id_Obtentor__c , "92"), IMAGE("/resource/Cerfoly","Cerfoly",65,100),""
) )) ) ) ) ) ) )) ))))))
CustomField.label: Logo Marca
